blocks.text: Reitan and Ventura are both adrift at T116/T120 — over par and out of contention as Woodland cruises toward the Houston Open title. A weekend to forget for Norwegian golf.
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard go for a Spring Classic result
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026 — the road to the World Championship starts now ★
